entry.title: New: Bill 53 (Hawaiʻi County) — PCPLUED: Bill 53 withdrawn by Introducer - 05/20/25
entry.content:
AMENDS CHAPTER 25, ARTICLES 1, 4, AND 5, OF THE HAWAIʻI COUNTY CODE 1983 (2016 EDITION, AS AMENDED), RELATING TO HENNERIES

Allows hens for household egg production on single-family residential zoning; provides for certain conditions and regulations.

Latest action: PCPLUED: Bill 53 withdrawn by Introducer - 05/20/25

View on the council site
